channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PM Modi Embarks on UAE and Europe Tour to Discuss Energy and Technology Partnerships Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has planned an official visit to the United Arab Emirates followed by a tour of four European nations, aimed at strengthening bilateral cooperation in energy and technolog...

item.title: Senate Parliamentarian Blocks Republican Immigration Funding Proposal
item.description: Republicans faced a major setback in the Senate as Parliamentarian Elizabeth MacDonough blocked key parts of a proposed immigration enforcement funding package. The package, aimed at fully funding Imm...

item.title: Chef Ben Shewry criticises food media after initial praise
item.description: Ben Shewry, the acclaimed chef behind Melbourne's renowned Attica restaurant, has publicly criticised the food media industry after years of receiving glowing reviews. Initially celebrated by critics ...

item.title: Key Updates: First Nations Concern Over Major Projects, Hantavirus Cases, and Political Developments in Canada
item.description: On May 14, 2026, several important developments unfolded across Canada. The Assembly of First Nations (AFN) national chief, Cindy Woodhouse Nepinak, criticized the federal government’s proposed change...

item.title: Legal Challenges Delay Alberta’s Proposed Separation Referendum Over Indigenous Consultation
item.description: Alberta’s proposed referendum on separation from Canada has been temporarily derailed following a court decision focused on Indigenous consultation. Justice Shaina Leonard of the Court of King’s Bench...

item.title: Montreal Victoire edges Ottawa Charge 3-2 in overtime to take first Walter Cup final game
item.description: In an exciting start to the Walter Cup finals, the Montreal Victoire secured a narrow 3-2 overtime victory against the Ottawa Charge in Game 1. The match was tightly contested, with both teams display...

item.title: South African mining growth slows amid global uncertainty and rising costs
item.description: South Africa’s mining sector experienced a slowdown in March, with production rising only 2.5% year-on-year, falling short of the 4.1% expected and well below February’s revised 9.7% increase. Statist...

item.title: Tanzania Launches Northern, Central, and Mtwara Agricultural Corridors to Boost National Farming Economy
item.description: Tanzania recently launched three major agricultural corridors – Northern, Central, and Mtwara – under the AGCOT framework to accelerate the Agriculture Master Plan 2050. The government aims to create ...

item.title: Government to Release Mid-Year Bonus for Employees Starting This Friday
item.description: The Philippine government has announced that all government employees will start receiving their mid-year bonuses beginning this Friday. This bonus, which is part of the government's yearly incentive ...

item.title: Key Factors in Choosing Senior Living Locations Across Canberra in 2026
item.description: When selecting retirement living options in the Australian Capital Territory (ACT), location plays a crucial role in access to healthcare, transport, and community services. In 2026, Canberra's senior...

item.title: Frenchie Mae Cumpio Recognized Internationally for Courage in Journalism Despite Imprisonment
item.description: Tacloban-based journalist Frenchie Mae Cumpio, who has been jailed since 2020 in a controversial terrorism financing case, was awarded the 2026 Wallis Annenberg Justice for Women Journalists Award by ...

item.title: Congress selects V.D. Satheesan as Kerala Chief Minister after decisive election win
item.description: India’s opposition party, Congress, has chosen 61-year-old veteran politician V.D. Satheesan as the Chief Minister of Kerala following a significant electoral win. This victory marks a rare bright spo...

item.title: Italy Wins 1938 World Cup Amid Rising Global Tensions
item.description: The 1938 Fifa World Cup in France took place under the shadow of mounting international tensions, with the world inching closer to war. Several teams were unable to participate due to political issues...

item.title: Keir Starmer’s Rapid Decline in Popularity and Political Challenges
item.description: Sir Keir Starmer remains the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, following Labour’s historic victory over the Conservatives in 2024. Despite this landslide win, Starmer’s time in office has been any...

item.title: Centre Hikes Petrol and Diesel Prices by ₹3 per Litre Amid Global Crude Price Rise
item.description: On May 15, 2026, the Indian government, under rising international crude oil prices due to the ongoing conflict in West Asia, announced an increase in petrol and diesel prices by ₹3 per litre across a...

item.title: Analysis Shows Most Passwords Are Easily Vulnerable to Cyber Attacks
item.description: According to a recent report by cybersecurity firm Kaspersky, an analysis of 231 million leaked passwords between 2023 and 2026 shows that 68 percent of modern passwords can be cracked within a single...

item.title: Carbon Removal Opportunities in the Humber Region and Its Urban Areas
item.description: The Humber estuary in northern England is emerging as a key region for carbon removal due to its access to abundant renewable energy and substantial CO₂ storage capacity. The area hosts the world’s la...

item.title: Oyo Police Arrest Suspected Kidnapper During N10m Ransom Collection
item.description: For Oyo State, one suspected kidnapper don land for hand of police as e dey collect N10 million ransom wey dem demand from the family of Alhaji Bagudu. According to police, the man and him gang carry ...

item.title: Late TikToker Maribel Irungu Opened Up About Her Long-Term Struggle With Bipolar Disorder
item.description: Kenyans are mourning the loss of popular TikToker Maribel Irungu, who passed away shortly after being hospitalised. Maribel was open about her decade-long battle with bipolar disorder, formerly known ...

item.title: Simba secures crucial win with Chama’s guidance in championship race
item.description: Simba SC managed to pull off a crucial victory in their title chase thanks to inspiring performance and guidance from Chama. The youth side of Simba showed strong dominance on the pitch, showcasing ne...
